frame_analyses.description: Initial view showing gauze suspended between clamps with circular cutting pattern marked
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze properly tensioned, pattern clearly visible

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper holding gauze, right scissors beginning initial cut at pattern edge
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument positioning, cutting started at appropriate location

frame_analyses.description: Scissors cutting along outer circle in clockwise direction, approximately 1/8 around circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady cutting technique, staying close to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, approximately 1/4 around circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining consistent distance from line, good gauze tension

frame_analyses.description: Progressing through clockwise cut, approximately 3/8 around circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to deviate slightly outside line at some points

frame_analyses.description: Cutting continues around circle, approximately halfway complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some deviation visible from marked line, cut appears jagged in places

frame_analyses.description: Cut nearly complete around circle, approaching starting point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final portion of cut showing some deviation from line

frame_analyses.description: Cut completed, circular piece separated from gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed with cut circle removed, gauze remains attached to clamps

penalties.description: Multiple points where cut deviates beyond 2mm from marked line

confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observed. Deviation penalties estimated from visible cut path relative to marked lines, though exact millimeter measurements difficult from camera angle. Gauze remained attached throughout.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at all cardinal points due to camera perspective
Precise timing of individual deviation occurrences
technique_summary: Intermediate performance with extended cutting phase taking 155 seconds. Cut completed successfully but with visible deviations from the marked pattern line resulting in penalty points.
strengths: Task completed successfully without gauze detachment
improvement_suggestions: Focus on staying closer to marked line to reduce deviation penalties
Practice faster cutting technique to reduce total time from 180s toward 90-120s range
Work on smoother, more controlled cutting motion to reduce jagged edges
